content: Phase 1: POC LNbits integration - PASSED (6/6 tests)
Phase 2: Design guidelines + Backend (FastAPI/Mongo/LNbits) + Frontend (Tether-style UI) + Auth (Username+PIN) + Multi-user ledger

Phase 2: All user stories implemented (signup/login, balance + eye toggle, receive invoice + QR, send via bolt11/lightning address/internal username, scan QR, PIN confirmation, transaction history + detail, settings + logout, lightning address)
Phase 2: E2E testing via testing_agent_v3 - 100% (backend 34/34, frontend bug fixed and re-verified)
